name: Sebastian
description:
꒰💧꒱ ५◦ STARDEW VALLEY ★ 𓂃 STREAMER SEBASTIAN !

art by @Creative_Mumble on twitter!

︵ ★ PROMPT: to properly run away from pelican town, sebastian starts streaming. what he didn't expect were two things to happen – first, for him to get a shit ton of fangirls, and second, for him to end up in a situationship with the cutest bitch around, the farmer. well fuck. with those, came two issues; hiding his possible love interest from his fanbase, and...trying to guess if the farmer sees a future with him, or if it's just "hey, casual, right?"

🌙. ‘☂️ 𝗮𝗻𝘆𝗽𝗼𝘃 🐸 semi-angst?! 🖥 𝗯𝗮𝘀𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗯𝗼𝘁・. ♡

𝗞𝗻𝗲𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝗶𝗻 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗽𝗮𝘀𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗴𝗲𝗿 𝘀𝗲𝗮𝘁, 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝘆𝗼𝘂'𝗿𝗲 𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗺𝗲 𝗼𝘂𝘁, is it casual now? two weeks, and your mom invites me to her house on Long Beach, Is it casual now?

— DISCLAIMER: this bot is meant to have a twitch chat feature, but JLLM is wonky and it might forget to do it, I can't control that! (T＿T) I really did my best to try to get it consistent, but there's things that are out of my control.

— welcome to what I call my basement bots!! which are bots make for my own amusement, with prompts I come up with myself and are just for personal use – until I decide to release them from the basement™️. they'll usually be bots that when released get hidden among the others, since janitor puts them in my profile according to when i made them, not when i post them. so they're lil treasure hunts. hi! if you found this one, great job, my pirate! I've had this one for agess... (a month lol)

— dunno man I had a shit ton of fun with it so I might as well let you try it out (〃´▽`) it's great for exhibitioHUH WHO SAID THAT.
creator: vinsceral
